summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgoBot leaderboard feature implementation. Backend leaderboard API working perfectly with 100% success rate. Frontend leaderboard page fully functional with all components rendering correctly. AgoBot branding successfully updated throughout the application. All navigation and existing features continue to work properly.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height rendering warnings in console for leaderboard charts
design_issues.note: Cosmetic console warnings only, charts display correctly. Common Recharts issue with dynamic containers.

design_issues.issue: HTML structure hydration warnings for table elements in dashboard and leaderboard
design_issues.note: Does not affect functionality, tables render and work properly. Common React SSR hydration issue.

passed_tests: GET /api/leaderboard endpoint returns all required fields with proper data structure
Leaderboard page loads at /leaderboard with full component hierarchy
Symbol rankings table displays correctly with rank badges and performance metrics
Leaderboard statistics cards show consistency, risk-reward, streaks, and time data
Best/worst trades lists display with proper formatting and data
Exit analysis pie chart and breakdown render correctly
PnL charts (symbol, weekly, hourly) display with responsive design
Navigation sidebar includes working Leaderboard link
AgoBot branding verified on login page (replacing CryptoBot)
AgoBot branding verified in sidebar navigation
Dashboard continues to work with KPI cards and bot controls
All existing navigation between pages (Dashboard, Trade History, Configuration) works
Authentication flow and user management unchanged
Bot control endpoints (start, stop, pause, resume) continue working
Trading data endpoints continue working (trades, positions, performance, prices)
